examples: He planed the projected paint and spackle off the wall.
Applications will be hooked together with a mixture of XSLT, XProc, duct tape, and spackle.
Mash up a few aspirin with enough water to make a paste and use like spackle to fill tiny holes.
No matter who they settle on, that player won't be good enough to fully Spackle over the hole left by Granderson's loss.
